message:
🐛 fix(acmm): pass force=true through badge → scan to bust blob cache (#9144)

The badge function calls the scan endpoint internally. When the scan's
Netlify Blob cache has stale data (e.g. after a repo file-tree change),
there was no way to force a fresh scan from the badge endpoint.

This threads the ?force=true query param from the badge request through
to the scan call so operators can bust both caches in one request:
  /api/acmm/badge?repo=owner/name&force=true

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
